action.reasoning: Observation: Data has 2180 train/467 val sequences, max_len=200, 149 skills, very low correct rate (0.196). Analysis: Small dataset, so a transformer-based SAKT model should work well. Low correct rate means I may need to handle class imbalance later. Decision: Implement SAKT model with quick 5-epoch training + immediate eval to measure iteration time and establish baseline.
